# Cimatti & Roberts Bricklaying & Construction

> Trusted bricklaying and construction in North Wales. 30+ years experience. Free advice and no-obligation quotes. Based in Deganwy, Conwy.

## About

Cimatti & Roberts Bricklaying & Construction is a family-run building company with more than three decades of hands-on experience. Co-founders Jason Roberts and Sam Cimatti deliver high-quality workmanship across all aspects of construction for homeowners and businesses in North Wales.

- Website: https://cimattiandroberts.co.uk
- Email: cimattiandrobertsbricklaying@outlook.com
- Address: 57 Parc Pentywyn, Deganwy, Conwy, LL31 9FP, United Kingdom
- Service area: North Wales — Deganwy, Conwy, Llandudno, Llandudno Junction, Colwyn Bay, Abergele, Rhyl, Bangor and surrounding areas
- Hours: Monday–Saturday (call anytime), Sunday closed
- Fully insured, quality guaranteed, free quotations

## Key Facts

- 30+ years of hands-on construction experience
- 8 primary service areas across North Wales
- 5.0-star customer rating
- Jason and Sam are contactable directly Monday to Saturday

## Contact

- Jason Roberts (Co-founder): 07861 140795
- Sam Cimatti (Co-founder): 07872 463390
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/p/Cimatti-Roberts-Bricklaying-construction-61567352952805/
- Google reviews: https://share.google/XKEjvlNhH3uxbzKFX

## Services

- Bricklaying — garden walls, new build brickwork, feature walls, cavity walls
- Extensions & New Build — single and double storey extensions, new build homes
- Structural Work & RSJs — load-bearing walls, steel beam installations, structural alterations
- Repointing & Brick Repairs — mortar renewal, damaged brick replacement, heritage brickwork
- General Building & Joinery — roofing, fencing, decking, general repairs
- Groundwork & Drainage — foundations, drainage, excavation, site preparation
- Plastering & Rendering — internal plastering, external rendering, pebbledash
- Landscaping & Paving — patios, driveways, garden transformations, Indian sandstone paving

## Service Areas

- Deganwy (head office location)
- Conwy
- Llandudno
- Llandudno Junction
- Colwyn Bay
- Abergele
- Rhyl
- Bangor

## Frequently Asked Questions

### What areas do Cimatti & Roberts cover?
North Wales including Deganwy, Conwy, Llandudno, Llandudno Junction, Colwyn Bay, Abergele, Rhyl, Bangor and surrounding areas.

### Do you offer free quotes?
Yes. Free advice and no-obligation quotations on all projects.

### What construction services do you provide?
Bricklaying, extensions, structural work, repointing, general building, groundwork, plastering, and landscaping.

### How many years of experience do you have?
More than 30 years of hands-on construction experience.

### Are you fully insured?
Yes. Fully insured with quality guaranteed on every project.

### How does your quoting and pricing work?
Free advice and no-obligation written quotations. Pricing is based on scope, materials and access with no hidden fees.

### What is your process from first contact to starting work?
Contact by phone, WhatsApp or online form. Site visit if needed, free quotation, agree a start date, then work begins with a clean, tidy site.

### Why choose Cimatti & Roberts over other builders?
30+ years experience, direct contact with both co-founders, fully insured, quality guaranteed, 5-star Facebook reviews, 8 service areas.
